channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: No. 8 Michigan State takes outright Big Ten regular-season title with 91-84 victory over Iowa
item.description: IOWA CITY, Iowa (AP) — Jace Richardson scored 22 points and No. 8 Michigan State wrapped up the outright Big Ten regular-season championship with an 91-84 victory over Iowa on Thursday night. Michigan State (25-5, 16-3) won its first conference title since 2020.
item.dc:creator: JOHN BOHNENKAMP, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wyndham Clark handles a stressful test at Bay Hill to lead by 2
item.description: Wyndham Clark has the lead at the Arnold Palmer Invitational after a brutal day of cold and wind at Bay Hill.
item.dc:creator: Doug Ferguson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bengals All-Pro edge rusher Trey Hendrickson receives permission to seek a trade, AP sources say
item.description: All-Pro edge rusher Trey Hendrickson, who led the NFL in sacks this past season, received permission from the Cincinnati Bengals on Thursday to seek a trade, two people with knowledge of the situation told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Man United draws 1-1 at Real Sociedad in Europa League and Tottenham loses to AZ Alkmaar
item.description: Manchester United settled for a 1-1 draw with Real Sociedad in the first leg of the Europa League round of 16 on Thursday. United led on Joshua Zirkzee's goal in the 58th minute but the hosts equalized 12 minutes later after Bruno Fernandes' hand ball.
item.dc:creator: KAREL JANICEK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: At the bobsled and skeleton world championships, some moms might make their way to the podium
item.description: LAKE PLACID, N.Y. (AP) — The latest addition to the list of amenities available to athletes at the bobsled and skeleton world championships is a room inside a lodge just down the hill from the finish line.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jaguars agree to trade receiver Christian Kirk to the Texans for a 2026 pick, AP source says
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — The Jacksonville Jaguars found a trade partner — a division rival, no less — for receiver Christian Kirk before officially releasing him.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ducks' goalie John Gibson goes behind the back for insane save of the year candidate
item.description: Before suffering an injury in the second period, Anaheim Ducks goalie John Gibson put his name on the "save of the year" list on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Yanni Gourde back where he belongs, in Tampa Bay
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning organization believes that adding two elite forwards Yanni Gourde and Oliver Byorkstrand will be the push they need to make a deep playoff run.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: AP mock NFL draft: Giants trade up to take Cam Ward No. 1 and Raiders move up for Shedeur Sanders
item.description: Cam Ward and Shedeur Sanders will be the first two quarterbacks selected in next month’s NFL draft. Where they go is still uncertain.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pete Rose’s Hall of Fame absence leaves ex-Mets manager in disbelief
item.description: Ex-MLB manager Buck Showalter became the latest to weigh in on whether Pete Rose should make the Hall of Fame during a recent appearance on OutKick's "Don't @ Me with Dan Dakich.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CMU Swimming is ready to chase their first National Championship
item.description: If there was ever a year for Colorado Mesa Swimming and Diving to bring home the program's first-ever national championship, this is the year.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: St. Thomas is rising with rare D3-D1 jump. NCAA postseason ban makes Summit tourney the present peak
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — One of the highest-scoring teams in the country has 22 wins, the No. 2 seed for its conference tournament — and no place to play after that. For the University of St. Thomas, the accelerated transition to full-fledged NCAA Division I member is almost over.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jimmy Johnson retires from Fox Sports after being face of NFL coverage for most of 3 decades
item.description: Jimmy Johnson, the Pro Football Hall of Fame coach who won two Super Bowls and a college national championship, announced his retirement from Fox Sports on Monday after being part of its NFL coverage for most of the network's 31 years.
item.dc:creator: Eric Olson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Shoeless Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks hit auction
item.description: There are about 118 pages in the scrapbook that contain various newspaper articles, box scores, summaries of baseball games and photographs of Jackson mounted to the pages.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, NewsNation

item.title: 1A, 2A, 3A, 4A basketball brackets are out, as 5A & 6A Sweet 16s are set
item.description: Postseason basketball has officially ramped up and is in full swing. Here is where every local team stands.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Shoeless Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks hit auction
item.description: NEW YORK (WGN) — A pair of scrapbooks belonging to "Shoeless" Joe Jackson are up for bid over the next two weeks. Offered by Leland's Auctions, up for bid is a collection of Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks obtained directly from Jackson's family.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Jordan Howlett, of the Fast Foods Secrets Club, returns to Oceanside High School
item.description: You may have seen Oceanside alum Jordan Howlett before while scrolling through your social media feed. Telling his over 25 million viewers on Instagram and TikTok to, "Come here," before he reveals the secret recipes of everyone's fast food favorites as part of his Fast Food Secrets Club.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Runnin' Utes trounce Arizona State, 99-73
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Ezra Ausar scored 25 points and Utah put up 58 points in the second half to pull away from Arizona State to earn its first win under interim coach Josh Eilert, 99-73 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 4 Houston clinches Big 12 regular-season title with 73-64 win over Cincinnati
item.description: L.J. Cryer scored 20 points and No. 4 Houston clinched the outright Big 12 regular-season title for a second straight season with a 73-64 win over Cincinnati on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes beat BYU on half-court overtime buzzer-beater
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes women's basketball team ended the regular season with a bang. Matyson Wilke hit a half-court shot at the buzzer as the Utes avoided a major upset against BYU Saturday afternoon at the Huntsman Center, 76-73.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Angelo Posada, The Titan of the Titans
item.description: "Those who stay will be champions" - that's the motto of Poway Wrestling; one they adopted from Michigan Football under that was adopted under legendary head Coach Bo Schembechler. That motto rings true for the five-time state champion Titans, who have won 44 CIF SDS titles in the last 47 years.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Gavin Lowe scores 35 as Olympus rolls to 5A title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The first two times Olympus and Highland met this season, both games were decided by a total of four points. But in Friday's 5A championship, it wasn't close at all.
item.dc:creator: ABC 4

item.title: San Diego FC home opener: Where to watch outside Snapdragon Stadium
item.description: After a stunning win against the Los Angeles Galaxy in its Major League Soccer debut, San Diego FC is set to make its first-ever appearance on the club's home turf on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5
